Their commitment to achieving positive outcomes demonstrates why they are such a strong option for anyone needing trusted and effective legal help.

I am extremely grateful to the entire team at Felicity Law Firm. They were attentive every step of the way, advising me on the right path, and thanks to their work, I was able to obtain the full amount.

I have a claim with this company for almost 1 year after a car accident. They received the money from the claim made to the other person's insurance and they have not sent me my money. I have them the right amount of time and will proceed to further steps because they are now saying they need to clarify or negotiate with the clinic I went which is taking them almost 7 months. To add that I have never been able to speak with my lawyer again. They were very fast to get my money and keep it with them. This is already causing colateral issues as my money is being mishandled by them and they are being very unprofessional!!!!!!

It's unbelievable how I just called the office and the person who answered hung up on me because they couldn't give me an answer. They've had my case for over a year, they've changed my lawyer more than three times, and they've never called to notify me. Three weeks ago, I called and a person named Christian informed me that they had changed my lawyer again. They said they would call me to schedule an appointment, but weeks have passed and I still haven't met the new lawyer. Every time I call, they put me through to a different person. My first lawyer missed a hearing because, according to the second lawyer, she forgot. My second lawyer was very kind, but apparently, he simply resigned, and I don't even know my new lawyer. It's infuriating and even rude. I've been polite and patient in every call (they're recorded by you and you can verify it), but you have undoubtedly disrespected me time and time again by not providing the proper attention and communication.
The worst experience with these people I need to resign my contract with them right now
These lawyers are tremendous garbage, you call them and they never answer, that Elizabeth never shows up, I don't recommend them at all.

My parents got into an accident it been almost 2 years total lost the other person fault we won the case but never heard back from them they keep hanging up the phone on us not giving us an answer or anything made him go to all this clinics etc.. at the end we know they stood with a 40 thousand check for themselves now we submitting a law sue to this company which it's a fake company they are a fraud all the good reviews you see here are lies it's them doing it by themselves Javier it's getting sue he said my lawyer was Derren Aponte who doesn't exist which the whole company it's getting sue at this moment I'm sorry to hear about the other people who went to this people hands but finally we taking over this shutting them down and specifically to the ones who hang up the phone on our faces the lady Javier and the rest who were involved as well.
I felt supported every step of the way. Mr. Felicetti explained everything clearly and fought hard for my case. Truly grateful.

My daughter was in an accident, and we hired this firm to represent her. Communication was very difficult because they never connect you with the attorney who's treating you. They sent her for several unnecessary tests and treatments and sent her to Miami twice for no reason. In the end, of the $30,000 her insurance granted, they actually got $8,000! Thank God, at one point, my daughter said I wouldn't do any more treatments because now I'm in pain I didn't have before. They have their own clinic, and they want to do MRIs and highly invasive treatments that are pointless. Oh! My daughter is under 21, and they wouldn't let me be with her during the treatments. When I finally got to see her, she was crying because she had a seizure, and they had left her alone in the office without even letting me know so I could be with her. I have the worst opinion.

Felicetti Law Firm took care of my case to the letter. They know the law to a T and can strategize for the best possible outcome. To top that, they are friendly, compassionate, and always considerate of the client.

I cannot possibly repay Felicetti Law Firm for the exemplary support I was provided. I couldn’t be more grateful for the exceptional representation provided by Ralph Patino and Alison Patino. From the very beginning of my product liability case, they demonstrated unmatched professionalism, deep legal expertise, and genuine compassion.

If you’re looking for attorneys who are knowledgeable, trustworthy, and truly care about their clients, I wholeheartedly recommend Ralph Patino and Alison Patino. Their hard work and expertise made all the difference. They were truly a Godsend to my life .

Allison at Patino & Associates was incredible to work with. She really cared about my case and went above and beyond to make sure everything was handled the right way. Excellence!

The office was incredibly attentive, and throughout the entire process we truly felt as though we were their only clients. The preparation of the forms was a very collaborative experience with the paralegal, and everything was completed efficiently in a short amount of time.
Before our interview, we met with our assigned lawyer, Carolina Collado who carefully explained the interview format and what we should expect. She prepared us thoroughly, and that preparation proved invaluable during the interview. Everything Carolina  told us was accurate and spot -on  and helped us feel confident in all our responses .
We chose to hire a lawyer not because we were incapable of completing the paperwork ourselves, but because this was THE most important interview of our lives. An officer’s decision regarding an adjustment of status can ultimately determine your entire future in the United States as an immigrant. Having the right legal guidance made all the difference.

I cannot say enough good things about Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes Immigration Law, and especially immigration attorney CAROLINA COLLADO along with her incredible legal assistants Melody Perkins and Claudia Fong. They are truly an invaluable immigration team.
For over 30 years of marriage, I've consulted with five or six different immigration attorneys trying to resolve my husband’s extremely complex immigration case. Every attorney gave me the same answer: “Leave it alone.” That was simply not an acceptable solution for our family. My husband is married to a U.S. citizen, a father of American children, a business owner, a taxpayer, and a contributing member of society.
Carolina Collado and the team at Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes were my last attempt before the new administration took office, and they accomplished what no other immigration lawyer had been able to do. It took time and patience, but they successfully guided us through the immigration and naturalization process with professionalism, persistence, and deep knowledge of immigration law.
TODAY, MY HUSBAND IS OFFICIALLY A UNITED STATES CITIZEN.
The peace of mind this has brought to our family is priceless. After decades of uncertainty, knowing that our family is secure and that everything we have worked our entire lives to build together is protected is truly the greatest gift we could have received.
Carolina, Melody, and Claudia are honest, hardworking, knowledgeable, and fair in their pricing. They handled a very complex immigration and citizenship case with dedication and genuine care.
If you are looking for an experienced immigration attorney who understands difficult immigration situations and the citizenship process, I highly recommend Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes Immigration Law and Carolina Collado’s team.
A true team of boss women who get results.

I cannot say enough positive things about Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes. From the very beginning, the entire firm was professional, courteous, and exceptionally responsive. Every question I had was answered clearly and promptly, and I was kept fully informed throughout the entire process.

A very special thank you to Alexa Delgado. Alexa went above and beyond in every respect — she was not only knowledgeable and thorough, but also patient and genuinely attentive. She took the time to explain complex issues in a way that was easy to understand, and I always felt confident that my matter was being handled with care and precision.

It’s rare to find a legal team that combines competence, communication, and professionalism at this level. I highly recommend Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes to anyone seeking strong representation with integrity and responsiveness.

reviews.text:
I cannot put into words how grateful my family and I are for Attorney Carolina Collado and her Paralegal, Melody Perkins. My dad’s immigration case was extremely complex and emotionally overwhelming, but from the very beginning they never once made us feel like it was too much or impossible. Not a single time did we hear “we can’t take this case.” Instead, they faced it head-on with determination, professionalism, and a genuinely positive attitude.

Carolina and Melody worked nonstop and were always just a phone call away. No matter how many questions we had or how worried we felt, they took the time to explain everything and reassure us. That kind of availability and compassion is rare, and it made an incredibly stressful situation feel manageable.

They treated my dad’s case with the care and urgency as if he were their own family member. I truly would not trust any other legal firm with something this important. reviews.text:
I had an extremely disappointing experience with Morgan Law Group and would strongly advise others to choose a different firm. From start to finish, this group demonstrated a lack of care, professionalism, and meaningful legal guidance.

Communication was poor and inconsistent, leaving me feeling ignored and uninformed during a process where clarity and responsiveness are critical. I did not receive thoughtful legal advice or proactive counsel—only minimal engagement that felt rushed and transactional rather than client-focused. At no point did I feel that my case or concerns actually mattered.

What’s most troubling is that attorneys are supposed to advocate for their clients and provide strategic, competent guidance. That did not happen here. Instead, I was left with unanswered questions, little direction, and the sense that my case was just another file in a stack. I’m still
Waiting to hear back from our attorney on our case and the proposed settlement offer. It’s been over a month since we heard back from him.

If you are looking for attorneys who genuinely care, take the time to understand your situation, and provide quality legal counsel, this is not the firm for you. There are far better law firms out there that treat clients with respect and deliver real value for the fees they charge.

I would not recommend Morgan Law Group to anyone and regret choosing them.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your concerns. We are sorry to hear that your experience has not met your expectations, especially regarding communication and the level of support you received.

Please know that your case is important to us. Since taking on your matter, our team has been actively engaged in discovery, managing court deadlines, and preparing for your upcoming trial. We have also coordinated with you and opposing counsel on depositions, document requests, and other case developments. However, we recognize that there have been delays in our updates, particularly regarding the status of your settlement offer, and we apologize for any frustration this has caused.

We are committed to improving our communication and ensuring you feel informed and supported throughout the remainder of your case. We will be reaching out to provide a detailed update on your case status and to address any outstanding questions you may have.

Your feedback is important to us, and we appreciate the opportunity to address your concerns directly. If you would like to discuss this further, please let us know a convenient time for a call.
Thank you!

reviews.text: Settlement did not take super long; however, disbursement of funds was delayed. Everyone at their office was professional and did try to assist with my issues regarding the delay.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Miranda,  we get it—waiting on your funds is frustrating. Just to clarify, your check has been mailed out. The delay is due to an issue with USPS, which is unfortunately out of our control. Rest assured, we’re tracking the situation and doing what we can to get this resolved. We appreciate your patience.

reviews.text: Lack of Communication never call you back or answer your calls very poor and unprofessional I will not give you 5 stars at all
reviews.ownerResponse:
We understand your frustration, Ms. Bracey, and we appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback. After a thorough review of your file by one of our litigation attorneys, we were concerned about the likelihood of achieving a successful outcome through litigation. Because of this, we were unable to move forward with your case.

Members of our Pre-Litigation Department spoke with you multiple times to explain these circumstances and the reasons behind our decision. We truly wish we could have assisted you and are sorry that we could not meet your expectations.

If you have any additional questions or would like clarification, please feel free to reach out.

He understood how much this green card meant to us—not just as a legal document, but as a crucial step in keeping our family and life together in the United States. He was always available to answer our questions, offering reassurance and support whenever we needed it. His belief in our case fueled our confidence, and we felt like we had an advocate who genuinely cared about our future.

Thanks to his hard work, my husband received his green card, and we are now able to move forward with our lives together without the constant worry of immigration status. We cannot thank Martin Rivas enough for his exceptional service, kindness, and unwavering support. He moved mountains for us while bigger firms like Pozo Goldstein took our money and did absolutely nothing for us.

If you are in need of an immigration lawyer, I wholeheartedly recommend Martin Rivas. He truly changed our lives, and we are forever grateful for his assistance. Thank you for everything!

However, this didn't happen; instead, an appeal was filed, and the motion wasn't submitted to the correct court, further complicating my case. I contacted Mr. Martín for help, and we began working on a very difficult case. But we had faith, and thanks to Mr. Martín Rivas's hard work, we succeeded. A few days ago, I received the good news, which was very comforting. My heartfelt thanks to attorney Martín R.!

reviews.text:
L.L., I am very grateful to attorney Martin Rivas.

My case, in my opinion, was very, very difficult. I had four DUIs, one open container, meaning I was arrested four times while under the influence, and once for public intoxication. I was at risk of being rejected when I applied for citizenship because I was a problem drinker, or rather, a person of low moral character.
When I went to the appointment, he accompanied me. I believe that support before the immigration judge was crucial because I wouldn't have been able to do it alone. There was even a risk of being deported, since I had obtained my residency through political asylum and because of my frequent visits to Nicaragua in 2018 and 2019. I made those visits because my fiancé lives there, and at that time Nicaragua was experiencing significant political unrest.

I am very grateful to attorney Rivas and recommend him to anyone in a difficult situation. They can trust that their case will be very well represented.

reviews.text:
I had excellent experience with this law firm.

We had solar panels installed on our roof, and the solar company's faulty installation caused leaks in multiple areas, eventually forcing us to replace the entire roof. Even then, the company refused to accept any responsibility. I sought legal counsel, and Attorney Gonzalez promptly responded to my inquiry.

He reviewed all documents and arranged expert witnesses. He and Attorney Vargas anticipated the defendant’s tactics, and when the solar company brought forward weak excuses during arbitration, they were fully prepared to counter them. After the arbitration, Attorney Ruiz submitted a well-reasoned brief that further strengthened my case.

I sincerely appreciate the expertise and dedication of Attorneys Gonzalez, Vargas, and Ruiz in resolving this matter. I’d also like to thank Jennifer, the paralegal, for coordinating communication throughout this long process.

Holding the solar company accountable for the damage they caused was a lengthy and challenging journey. The three attorneys I worked with were consistently thoughtful, thorough, and strategic in preparing my case. They’re a 10 out of 10 in my book, and I’d recommend them to anyone needing legal assistance!
reviews.ownerResponse: Carrie, thank you for your generous review and for trusting our firm during a very difficult situation. Our entire team is committed to ensuring clients are heard, protected, and given the strongest possible representation. We’re proud to have helped you hold the solar company accountable and are grateful for your confidence in Attorneys Louis Gonzalez and Andrew Vargas. We’re always here if you need anything.

If I took the ridiculous offer the insurance company made, I could lose the case and have to pay the lawyers' fees myself. 🤦🏻‍♀️ It was a good excuse to avoid going to trial, because supposedly, if the judge approved me being covered by the insurance, we would have won most of the case. God, the worst experience with lawyers I've ever had. They are incredibly incompetent, and it takes them days and days to even answer a message. After seven years of waiting, I think the only person who answered was the owner of the firm, but other than that, none of the people who work there have an ounce of professionalism. Please know that we have submitted your claim to the bankruptcy court handling the matter and are currently awaiting further instruction from the court.

A member of our team will be reaching out to you directly to discuss your concerns and the next steps for your case. We are committed to helping you through this and appreciate your patience as we continue to navigate the legal process on your behalf.

reviews.text:
Approximately three years ago, I trusted this firm to litigate a water damage case in the kitchen of my rental property. During all this time, I had very little information or contact with their firm. Approximately four months ago, I accepted a fairly reduced settlement because I didn't want to continue waiting for litigation.
Several times, they sent me documents to notarize and complete, which I promptly did. However, it's been approximately two months and I haven't received the two checks owed. I contact them by phone, and either the person in charge is having lunch, or they ask me to leave my information so they can return my call, or they tell me the checks will arrive soon.
I have written several emails to the lady in charge (of which I have a copy), and she doesn't even bother to answer them. In today's email, I informed her that I would have to write derogatory reviews, as negligence and disrespect should not be qualities for any self-respecting employee or company. I hope that the just request I am making here will finally be taken into account.

reviews.text:
On 9/10/2024, Mr. Parlade called me in response to the questionnaire I filled out the day prior. He asked me for documentation regarding my case, which I promptly provided that same day. I even made it clear that I was happy to provide anything else that might be needed. At that time, I was told it would be 2-3 weeks before I heard back from their team after they reviewed my case and documents.

However, I did not receive any communication or updates until I reached out on 10/11/2024, a full month later, to inform Mr. Parlade that the solar panel installer had merged with another company. In response, I received an email from Ms. Castano on 10/14/2024, stating that the a contract was missing. It is baffling that this wasn’t mentioned or requested at any point during the month my case was supposedly being reviewed. Nevertheless, I promptly provided the missing document that same day.

On 10/15/2024, Mr. Parlade called to inform me that the firm was still exploring my opportunities for a civil suit, but that I had a direct suit and that I would be represented. This naturally gave me hope that help and justice were finally within reach. I signed the representation agreement that same day.

Imagine my surprise when, on 10/17/2024, I received a short and impersonal email from Ms. Castano stating that the class action attorney could not take my case. No explanation was given as to what changed in such a short period of time, and to go from being told I would be represented to receiving a cold dismissal is both unacceptable and unprofessional.

Do not recommend
reviews.ownerResponse:
We take all feedback seriously, as it helps us improve the quality of our services. While our legal team initially saw potential for direct representation, additional considerations later arose that affected our ability to proceed.

We appreciate the effort you put into providing the necessary documents. If you have any further questions or would like to discuss this matter in more detail, please feel free to reach out to us directly at (407) 794-3056 or marketing@vargasgonzalez.com

reviews.text: This firm is highly recommended. Through this firm I was victorious against Citizens Property Insurance for a claim they refused to pay for. Andrew Vargas is a great attorney and he will fight to get you the compensation you deserve.

I am deeply disappointed with my experience with attorney Michael Ortiz and the firm Vargas. We had a bill with a client they were representing, and despite including them and the insurance adjuster in our email communications, they settled the case and completely left out my bill.

Since then, I have been continuously given the runaround with no clear answers or resolution. They have refused to pay me, and it feels like I'm being taken back and forth with no end in sight.

Due to their unprofessional conduct and failure to address this matter, I am left with no other option but to file a complaint with the Florida Bar for attorneys. I hope no one else has to go through such a frustrating and disappointing experience with this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: At no point did our firm represent you or your company. As you are aware, your company had a noncompliant assignment of benefits contract, which is why you chose not to pursue your invoice legally through the insurance company. Your company agreed to hold the Insured harmless by Florida law when you agreed to do the work under an assignment of benefits. I urge you to communicate with your legal counsel to address this issue, and to discontinue making public threats against our attorneys or our firm.

reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry you had this opinion of Scott Merl, P.A. It is important to note that, Scott Merl, P.A. was contacted 9/7/2017 as Hurricane Irma was approaching Miami. reviews.text:
From my very first conversation with Solorzano Law, I felt genuinely cared for and supported. I was navigating a medical claim and had countless questions—some small, some complex, and many I wasn’t even sure how to phrase. The team welcomed every concern with patience, kindness, and clear explanations. I never felt rushed or intimidated; instead, I felt understood and reassured at each step.

Solorzano Law excels at turning complicated legal and insurance terminology into plain language. They answered every question thoroughly, checked to make sure I felt comfortable with the next steps, and followed up proactively so I was never left wondering what came next. Their responsiveness was exceptional—I always knew my doubts were put at ease.

Beyond their deep knowledge of medical claims, what stood out most was their empathy. They took time to understand the details of my situation and tailored their approach accordingly. They anticipated potential hurdles and prepared me for each milestone so there were no surprises. Their guidance helped me make informed decisions with confidence and far less stress.

Scheduling was flexible and immediate, they took time out of their day (even 'off' hours) to respond and keep me informed. Even when I had last‑minute concerns, the team handled them with grace and never made me feel like a burden. Their kind demeanor made an overwhelming process feel manageable.
Integrity and transparency you can trust

Solorzano Law was transparent and straightforward. They explained the “why” behind each recommendation—best‑case, worst‑case, and most likely outcomes—so I always felt prepared. That honesty built genuine trust and gave me peace of mind during a challenging time.

I am deeply grateful for the compassion, clarity, and professionalism I received from Solorzano Law. If you’re dealing with a medical claim and want a law firm that answers every question with patience and treats you with true care, I wholeheartedly recommend them. Their blend of expertise and kindness made all the difference.

Thank you!

What really stood out was how responsive and attentive they were throughout the process. I always felt like a priority, and I never had to wonder what was happening with my case. reviews.text: Dabdoub provided 10 star service - they deserve way more than the 5 stars available on Google!  Kevin was the attorney who worked our case to appeal termination of employer disability benefits.  While we ultimately expected extended litigation, we received a reinstatement at appeal for full and retroactive benefits.  Kevin’s diligence plus his extensive knowledge of industry regulations and insurer behavior carried our case to the desired outcome.  Through every interaction Kevin demonstrated patience and empathy in working with my sister who has been disabled for over 10 years.  Kevin was honest and caring, easily reachable for questions, as well as proactive in pursuit of justice.  Dabdoub offered the best rates of all the firms I evaluated.  They were upfront about fees through every step from the beginning to end, which I appreciated to understand the full financial picture as well as the process that would be involved to reinstate benefits.  I wholeheartedly recommend Dabdoub and Kevin to anyone seeking resolution for wrongful termination of disability benefits.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jennifer, we appreciate your heartfelt recommendation. Thank you for recognizing Kevin’s commitment and the careful support provided throughout your case.

reviews.text: Excellent firm. Great support and results on my appeal with big Insurance company. Highly recommended.

Outstanding Long Term Disability (LTD) Legal Support from attorney Emily Quirino – Truly the Best Service I’ve Ever Received:

I cannot speak highly enough of attorney Emily Quirino and the exceptional service she provided throughout my LTD appeal. This was by far the best service I’ve ever experienced in any field, not just in legal matters. I honestly wish every professional service I use operated at the same level of excellence as Emily’s

From the very beginning, I could tell that Emily is an outstanding professional. She is extremely responsive, always replying to emails the same day and addressing every question in detail. She never dismisses concerns or leaves you feeling unheard, and she has a remarkably organized process that makes everything clear and manageable. I’d also like to acknowledge Claudio Reyes from Emily’s team, who was my main point of contact. He responded to emails promptly and, most importantly, diligently organized and kept all my medical records in order.

Emily is not only intelligent and knowledgeable but also genuinely takes the time to explain each step of the process, which brought me a great deal of clarity and confidence. Her respectful and approachable manner made me feel supported throughout the journey, and her consistent communication ensured I never felt lost or in the dark. Although she is incredibly busy and certainly not obligated to do so, it was truly generous of her to take the time to explain even the more complicated legal aspects.

Most importantly, thanks to her expertise and dedication, we achieved a highly successful outcome. I am truly grateful for her guidance and professionalism, and I would wholeheartedly recommend Emily to anyone seeking reliable LTD legal support.

I’ve consulted with many lawyers, yet Emily’s quality of service, responsiveness, clarity, attention to detail, and dedication are truly in a class of their own.

Emily, I will always be deeply grateful for your support during such a difficult time and for helping me maintain my livelihood

I had an excellent experience with my long-term disability lawyer, Ms. Geannina Burgos at Dabdoub Law Firm. From the start, she was professional and attentive. Ms. Burgos and her staff expertise of long-term disability law was impressive, and they fought for my rights which led to approved claim benefits. While a client, I felt supported throughout the entire process, and I highly recommend Ms. Geannina Burgos and Dabdoub Law Firm services.
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your thoughtful recommendation and happy to hear you felt truly supported by Ms. Burgos and our team throughout your case.

reviews.text:
I engaged Dabdoub Law Firm in January 2025 to manage my LTD appeal, and it changed everything. Emily Quirino took over my appeal and managed my case with precision and professionalism.

Reliance’s tactics were predictable—delays, repeated requests for documents already in their possession, and an attempt to send me to an unlicensed "specialist" to assess my condition.  Emily and team quickly secured an appropriately licensed professional and submitted a clear, evidence-based appeal. Reliance reversed its decision, and my benefits were reinstated within 2,5 months.

Dabdoub continues to manage my claim, giving me some peace of mind to focus on getting to a better place of wellness. Since engaging Dabdoub, I have not had to speak with anyone from Reliance or my former employer’s HR department.

I highly recommend Dabdoub Law Firm to anyone facing an LTD appeal or termination of benefits. Their advocacy is unwavering, their strategy is sharp, and their results are real.

reviews.text:
Following the Daboub law firm’s bad advice cost my disabled son much more than if he had never talked to them in the first place. I’m worried I will lose my son to suicide because of Daboub law firm’s malpractice.

My son was a successful self-employed young man and founded an award winning business that had celebrity clients, and was written up in many national publications over a decade. It was incredible.

Then he suffered a head injury requiring brain surgery and woke up partially paralyzed. But it affected everything. He became moody and demonstrated poor judgment and could no longer do what he was once capable of. He suffered from crippling anxiety. Then more physical issues arose leading to crippling pain. The head injury caused brain damage and the business unraveled. The medical documentation of his suffering and disability was overwhelming but he could not submit the Insurance claim without help.

But Daboub law firm’s terrible advice from the attorney named Nina made him waste his retirement money while they took more than a year to process the claim and all he got from the policy was not even enough to cover the tax penalties from liquidating his retirement while he waited. He was told he could receive no money while the claim Processed. It got so bad my son had to move out of his house and secretly live in his office And eat from the microwave while in agonizing pain and riddled with anxiety as he desperately waited for the firm to take action against the insurance company. All the Firm ever did was tell my son he needed to “give the Insurance company time.” My son is out of time and they just didn’t want to spend their money to sue.

Worse The Daboub law firm constantly catered to the insurance company’s changing demands and made my son produce constantly changing documentation , including tax returns as a self employed person— even though he told them he didn’t have the money to hire an accountant and wasn’t mentally capable of doing the work after his head injury. He asked Daboub law firm for a social worker or an accountant to help sort through this and got nothing. Out of sheer desperation and after thoughts of suicide and crippling fears of being arrested for fraud he did his best to create the tax returns so he could get the financial support he desperately needed. He asked the lawyers and MBAs at Daboub to review the taxes and they did and said they were good. They told him to expect a pay out going back to the day he had his brain injury. But instead the insurance company used the inaccurate tax returns created by a disabled person as a basis to pay only a fraction of what was due.

This is a breach of duty and competence by the Attorneys at Daboub law firm and it caused direct harm and damage to my son. It’s malpractice clear as day. But they still got their fee! And my son still has nothing. If they don’t fix it before my son gives up I will devote the rest of my life to making them pay for what they’ve done.
I am very pleased with the work this firm has done for me. I would have been lost without their help.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are happy to hear it. Thank you for the kind words.

reviews.text:
I had the privilege of working with attorney Larry McMillan on a case that spanned four years, involving false accusations made by an employee. Not only was this person a long term employee but she was trusted and became a part of our family. Throughout this challenging ordeal, Larry's guidance and expertise were invaluable.

One of the most impressive aspects of working with Larry was his ability to keep me calm and focused, even in the face of emotionally charged situations. He constantly reminded me of the importance of taking emotion out of the lawsuit.

What stood out the most about Larry's approach was his commitment to sticking to the facts. He meticulously gathered evidence, presented it effectively, and navigated the legal complexities with precision.

Furthermore, Larry was always available to address any questions or concerns I had along the way. His responsiveness and willingness to provide clear explanations were immensely reassuring during such a prolonged legal battle.

In the end, thanks to Larry's expertise and steadfast approach, we prevailed in the case. I highly recommend attorney Larry McMillan to anyone in need of a skilled and reliable legal advocate.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Fernandez,

Thank you for your review. We understand that handling insurance claims after a storm can be frustrating, and we appreciate the opportunity to clarify the facts of your case.

Your insurance claim resulted in a gross recovery of approximately $40,000, which included attorney's fees and legal costs as per Florida law. The payment you received was $10,000, based on the insurer's assessment that Hurricane Ian did not produce winds strong enough in South Florida to warrant the complete replacement of your roof. The remaining funds were used for attorney's fees and costs as permitted by law.

Of the $10,000 you received, you chose to pay mitigation companies and a public adjuster, which reduced your net recovery to approximately $4,000. Moises|Gross did not withhold any portion of your funds beyond what is legally and contractually authorized.

We are committed to representing our clients within the bounds of the law and the facts of each case. If you would like to discuss your claim further, we are available to speak with you directly.

Sincerely,
Moises Gross

Highly recommend!

The initial amount received from our awful insurance company was less than half of what it will actually cost to repair our house from Hurricane Ian damage.  We were at the end of our rope and nearing the deadline to file a lawsuit.  Many of our friends and acquaintances had gone the “public adjuster” route, with mixed results (Or even worse, just settled for the pittance received from their insurance co.).  After seeing a Cernitz ad online and doing a little research, we decided to give them a call.  From the start, Justin, Adam, and the entire team were attentive, answered our questions clearly, and recognized immediately that we were grossly underpaid for our claim.  The whole process took a while, but along the way they communicated what was happening, responded to our calls and emails in a timely manner, and were very professional.  Most importantly, they got results!  Cernitz was able to recover more in our settlement than what the insurance company (backed by one of the largest underwriters in the world) initially paid us.  Almost three years after Ian, we were afraid we would never be made “whole” and compensated appropriately, but Cernitz got it done.

If you need to fight “big insurance”, do not hesitate - Cernitz can take them on and win!

Hands down Adam Feldman from Cernitz law is the best lawyer a client can ask for! Here is why..
We purchased a high end vehicle from a dealership in Fl.
After the payment in full and months of a waiting period for the title, we realized we were dealing with a fraudulent dealership. They never had the title of the vehicle. Even worse for us, we gave them back their vehicle while they still had our money. Of course they agreed to refund us our money but since they were liars they gave us the run around for another 5 months. We had enough of their lies and finally decided to find us a lawyer to take care of the matter.
We did our due diligence to look for the best lawyers in Florida and that lead us to Cernitz Law firm. Their reviews were excellent .
We spoke with Adam about our case and right away we knew he was the right lawyer for us because He cared about our situation.
After hiring him, Adam didn’t disappoint. He got us quickly all our money back from the dealership and even more. We simply couldn’t ask for a better lawyer.
Adam was very efficient and he is great at what he does . He doesn’t mess around 🤣
On top of that he is very professional and communication was great.
We are grateful we have him as a lawyer and we definitely recommend him and the Cernitz team to anyone in need of their services
Thank you Adam.

These lawyers are incredibly unprofessional. They never answer the phone, and then one day the secretary on duty answers (I say this because they change secretaries frequently). Between calls, they keep you waiting, giving you information about your case, and then one day, after a long wait and after being told there was a case, they finally tell you there wasn't. How can this be explained? What kind of professionals do that? I imagine it's clear they're selling out. They also have a habit—and I know this from a former client I met—of making him sign a document in English (and the client only spoke Spanish) for a sum of money they were supposedly going to give him for a case. At the same time, it said the rest of the money was for payments to the clinics, and then the clinic would call the client. This is a complete scam. In my opinion, they are totally irresponsible, unprofessional, and thieves. Please share everything that happens to them so we can get them reported to the bar association for all the awful things they do to their clients.
